ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Customer's middle name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Customer's contact number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's residential address */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Customer's marital status */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Customer's nationality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who holds the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance policy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the policy started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the policy ends */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Amount of premium paid for the policy */,
  "coverage_amount" REAL /* Total coverage amount provided by the policy */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Amount the customer is responsible for paying before the insurance coverage begins */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy renewal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the policy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the policy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_policy_type FOREIGN KEY ("policy_type") REFERENCES policy_types ("policy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy under which the claim was made */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., medical, accidental, death) */,
  "claim_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the claim */,
  "approved_amount" REAL /* Amount approved for the claim */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES claim_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the income was reported */,
  "reported_income" REAL /* Income reported by the customer */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of income (e.g., salary, business, investment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the income record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the income record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy renewal record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy */,
  "days_to_renew" INTEGER /* Number of days until the policy is up for renewal */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the policy is scheduled for renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy renewal (e.g., pending, renewed, not renewed) */,
  "renewal_method" TEXT /* Method of renewal (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the renewal record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the renewal record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_renewals_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_types" (
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy type */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy type */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the coverage provided by the policy type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the policy type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the policy type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Customer's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Customer's education level */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Customer's occupation */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the customer has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_demographics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_logs" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the communication */,
  "communication_medium" TEXT /* Medium of communication (e.g., email, phone, in-person) */,
  "communication_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the communication (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the communication log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the communication log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment of customers targeted by the campaign */,
  "campaign_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer response */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marketing campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., policy purchase, request for information) */,
  "response_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the customer's response (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the response record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the response record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the compliance report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
